title: Order
description: A buyer's commitment against an Offer: the Agent Commerce Protocol transaction. An Order is placed by a buyer Identity, fulfilled by a seller Identity, settled by a Payment, and moves through a lifecycle of States advanced by Events (placed -> accepted -> fulfilled -> settled / cancelled / refunded). The Order is the closed-loop plant whose State the settlement controller drives to its setpoint.

status.description: placed | accepted | fulfilled | settled | cancelled | refunded.
